lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: As the train entered the glass district, rain was sweeping sideways across the canopy. Every window looked wiped clean, then freshly marked.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I had come to audit a batch of false alerts. Then the same time appeared on the window three times: 07:41:09.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Don't touch the glass. That isn't a passenger display. Contact will write your biometric digest into the circuit.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: When you stepped out from behind the service panel, I recognized your voice first. I just couldn't remember where from.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Lin Yao, signal architecture for the Gleam Network. The system reported your name before you scanned a badge, Zhou Heng.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Then it wasn't a false alert. My badge is still in my coat, and this train can't read an auditor's identity cache.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: That's why I told you not to touch it. It isn't identifying you. It feels more like it was waiting for you to return.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Two heart-rate traces surfaced under the timestamp, one fast and one slow. My watch was offline, but the slower trace changed with me.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The other changed with me. Look away and tell me what else you saw. Describe it, but don't complete it for the signal.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: An unlit platform. Rain falling through a split in the roof. The floor said seventeen, but Xiangang has no Platform Seventeen.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: No more details yet. If we saw the same image, repeating it could stitch our two fragments together.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: You said “the same image” without asking for the platform number. You saw seventeen too, didn't you, Lin Yao?

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The archive's emergency cache went offline eight years ago. That pulse followed the train here, and now it's moving along the outer wall.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Rainwater is bridging the facade nodes. It's treating each building as the next pane of glass, taking a route that only exists in this weather.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Sensory frames don't belong on public routing. Gleam carries alerts and indexes. Personal memory isn't even a compatible format.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: But it showed us the same platform. Either the isolation guarantee was false, or someone buried an exception very well.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: This isn't a message someone left for us. The frame came from the Refraction Incident. Every shared cache from that night was ordered erased.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I remember the incident report, not being there. My personal timeline is missing exactly eleven minutes, starting at 07:41.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Mine is missing the same eleven. We signed a mutual seal afterward and closed everything that indexed one of us through the other.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: You say “we” like you're reading someone else's file. I didn't know I had met you, let alone signed anything with you.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I remember one form more than you do. Two names, two consent signatures, and a witness signature that failed validation.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The witness device and request device were the same terminal. It let the machine filing the seal attest to its own request.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The seal executed, but its legal state stayed “awaiting witness.” It wasn't a back door. It was an error nobody owned.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: So the cache was never erased. It kept waiting for both holders to return, and tonight it finally put us on the same line.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I've put the booth in local mode. The network outside can see two maintenance badges in here, but not what we're reading.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: This old display can't parse memory frames, but it recognizes 07:41:09. It labels the time as the cache's first write.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Platform Seventeen was still on construction plans when the incident happened. After the blackout, the whole level was hidden from public maps.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I was checking evacuation markers. You were handling temporary signals. That's why we both know a platform that never opened.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Smoke blinded the locator lights, so we enabled a paired sensory buffer. You watched my path. I listened to your breathing. We corrected each other.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: That function only appeared in a rescue draft. The official report says no personal sensory data was written at the scene.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The report is tidy because the buffer saved the route and broke the isolation rules. Review chose to seal first and assign responsibility later.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Later never came. The system had three major updates, but that cache stayed in the glass with the ownership error untouched.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I agreed to the seal because every time I closed my eyes, I couldn't tell whose sensation was whose. I thought deletion would restore the line.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I don't know why I agreed. Lost consent can't decide for me now, but it does tell me someone was afraid back then.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Tonight's rain changed the glass addresses. The old cache was mistaken for a recoverable node. It didn't wake up. It found an exit.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The checksum ring is incomplete. Repeating the time and platform is a request for both holder digests, not a plea for help.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Then a single-person shutdown will always fail. We read every consequence together, then decide whether this disappears or remains.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The trace climbed the archive wall, then crossed three towers on rainwater bridges. Glass kept separate by daylight had become one wet net.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Stop there. At nineteen meters, the pulse breaks. Step inside eighteen and it resumes filling frames. We are the endpoints.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: A channel that exists only when two people are close. The old design had no session authentication. Distance was the second key.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: There's another image. A wall, emergency lights, a hand on a railing. Describe only the structure. Don't decide whose hand it is.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I remember you holding my wrist and making me match your breathing. It wasn't a promise. We were both trying to stay conscious.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Thank you for not turning it into something else. A shared ordeal becomes a debt too easily. I won't use it to claim anything from you.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: And I won't mistake familiarity for fact. When this is over, whether we want to know each other is a question we ask again.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: This block isn't part of the sensory buffer. It's a system diagnostic showing the write order between the seal and reflection cache.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The order is wrong. It copied shared frames into the facade emergency layer before sealing. Deletion never touched the duplicate.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The public was promised physical isolation. This copy proves personal fragments can enter the city facade during emergency mode.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: And it won't be just us. Anyone who used paired buffering may have a fragment waiting for the wrong condition to revive it.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The diagnostic proves the gap, but it also exposes the old maintenance topology. Before a patch, someone could deliberately build a rain route.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The proof is tied to our time signatures. We can redact the images, but remove both holder digests and the evidence no longer verifies.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: No transparent walls, no public light path. The signal is weaker here. We have a few minutes to state all three options clearly.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Option one: publish the diagnostic signature and patch summary. The images stay local, but our identity digests become evidence.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The cost is immediate exposure. Publication stops anyone erasing the gap quietly. Until the patch lands, the attack surface is real.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Option two: close the reflection cache and erase every local memory cross-indexed with it. The anomaly can never find us again.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: That erases the incident and everything we reconstructed together tonight. We can keep a maintenance record with no personal content.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: So tomorrow we can know there was an anomaly, but not remember who stood here with us when the decision was made.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Option three: seal the old cache and build a separate dual-key channel. Limited time, limited bandwidth, fresh consent every time.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: It can retain descriptions we choose together without touching raw sensory frames. It's feasible, but not fully stress-tested tonight.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: If isolation fails, our boundaries may blur again. Identity drift, timeout, or either endpoint going unresponsive must close it at once.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Which one do you want? I'm not asking you to decide for me. I want to know what you're afraid of now.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Publishing too early could hurt people. Calling erasure “protection” could repeat the past. What I fear most is hiding the cost from you.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Our old signatures show what happened. They don't grant consent now. Every step tonight gets confirmed again by both of us.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Agreed. Whatever we choose, we state the terms aloud and execute it together. If either of us withdraws, the action stops.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: By the time we reached the bridge, facade alerts had spread from one building to seven. The signal didn't speak. It only wrote the time brighter.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: One more rise in rain pressure will renumber the nodes. The cache may leave maintenance routing. We have one complete write left.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Every lit window below us rests on the same promise. Nobody knows an ordering bug once crossed the boundary around their memory.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: If we publish, your time signature enters a permanent record. No one sees the hand, but they will know you held the incident cache.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: My identity can be evidence. Our private fragments cannot become public property. If we publish, that line has to hold.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: If we close it, every shared index from the incident and tonight goes to zero. We won't struggle to remember. We won't know there is a blank.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The maintenance record remains. It will show that two people chose closure together, not that one pressed the key for both.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: If we build a channel, we keep a connection and accept the risk of testing a new boundary. It cannot become a door left open forever.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Only chosen content, with expiry, audit, and revocation. The system gap still goes to repair. A channel can't excuse hiding it.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: None of these paths is clean, and none is a punishment. We're deciding which consequence we can face without lying about it.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I'll state my choice. Confirm it only after you've heard me, not for who I was eight years ago or what returned tonight.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I'll confirm my own choice and keep the right to stop. Zhou Heng, we decide where this signal goes now.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I choose publication. Not our memories. What the system did and what it failed to do goes into a record that cannot be withdrawn.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I consent to publishing the diagnostic and holder digests. I refuse release of images, breathing records, or recoverable sensory data.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The observatory's old uplink isn't controlled directly by Gleam. We can escrow the evidence and patch in separate zones, then release both together.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Understand this: the first minutes after the topology digest goes public are the most dangerous. Someone may infer where other caches lie.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: If we publish only “a problem exists,” it becomes another false alert. The evidence must be reproducible, and the risk belongs on page one.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The public doesn't own our eleven minutes. It does need to know the isolation promise failed and the exact conditions of that failure.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I'm splitting the package. Outside: write order, version, patch hash, and dual-holder proof. Inside: private content that never uploads.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The cache is rejecting the split. It wants complete sensory frames for its checksum. I'll have local hardware attest without releasing them.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The attestation must say the device saw hashes, not meaning. We can't protect privacy by inventing another false witness.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Terms set: two current consents, two independent device proofs, one public patch clock. If any one fails, nothing publishes.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Confirmed. My name may remain; my memory may not. If the escrow opens early, I withdraw from this release.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Confirmed. The glass is lighting up. The signal accepts the boundary. Now it will see that we have not lied.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The release crossed the rain from the observatory to the public array. No window showed an image. The same evidence hash appeared across the city.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Patch escrow is active, seventeen minutes to completion. Until then, the maintenance topology will be easier than usual to infer.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Patch first, and insiders could erase the proof. Publish first, and the city carries the window. We started both together.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The array is throttling anomalous addressing, slower than planned. The risk isn't gone. Every response is simply on record now.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I just remembered something I said after the incident: if only one of us remembers, never use the memory to force belief from the other.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I remember it too. That's why I never found you. Not because I didn't care. All I had was one form I couldn't prove.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: What I believe now is the evidence in front of me and the consent you just gave. The past can return, but it cannot outrank today.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Then the record stops at fact. We sealed together. Tonight we published together. We don't define anything beyond that for each other.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Public receipt confirmed. The package is mirrored beyond any single administrator's reach, and the patch clock is still running.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The first unregistered reflection caches are isolated. The count isn't zero. This gap reached beyond the two of us.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The anomaly is receding from the rain, with one final block lit. The display reads: proof complete, private layer remains sealed.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: It has stopped waiting for our witness. What went unfinished eight years ago wasn't a feeling. It was responsibility the system abandoned.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Seventeen minutes later, the patch completed. The public notice admitted isolation had failed and that maintenance never reported it in time.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Our names aren't in the notice, but the evidence index has two anonymous holder signatures. Someone determined enough may trace them.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I accept that exposure. From tonight on, no investigation can be ended with “the system can't do that.”

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Two maintenance maps leaked briefly. Isolation is closing them now. Publication didn't make us heroes. It made the problem visible.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The private layer is still on my device. I remember Platform Seventeen and your hand. I won't use either to prove what we should be.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: You may remember. Just don't count that hand as a debt, or turn a decision I made then into a promise now.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The rain was too light to bridge the glass. For the first time, the window held only our present reflections. No old frame.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Good. The past has done the work it needed to do. Whatever comes next doesn't have to be arranged by an incident cache.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Coffee after we finish the report? No seals, no evidence. We start with the part of tonight we actually chose to remember.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: First we review the exposure window. After sunrise, if you still want to ask, ask me again.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I nodded and put the terminal away. The city still had a gap, but now it stood inside everyone's record.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I choose to close the signal and erase every path it can use to find us. I understand the shared index will have no recoverable copy.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I consent to closure. The record keeps only the gap class, disposition hash, and two current signatures. No personal content.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The null process crosses twelve nodes. With each one, the related memory indexes lose another name until nothing points across.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I'll call the node. You verify the hash. Any mismatch and we stop. Having started is not permission to continue.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: When the first light died, Platform Seventeen flashed once more. Rain fell through the split roof without sound, like an old silent film.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I see myself counting your breaths. One to four, then back to one. It was to keep you awake, not to put you in my debt.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I remember asking you not to leave me alone when I woke. You didn't promise forever. You said we should get off the platform first.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Don't finish that answer for who I was. What we can give each other now is this choice, completed without a last-minute promise.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I confirm node five. Your hand is close to mine, but we don't touch. The process doesn't need our bodies to prove consent.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Node eight complete. The checksum now sees two anonymous digests, not two people. The images are losing time and place.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I still know what 07:41:09 means, but it no longer feels like memory. It feels like a work order someone else filed.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The last four nodes are in the null room. Inside, we may forget the platform first, then why the other's voice feels familiar.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: There are no windows in the null room. The record appears on an opaque wall, preserving the action without any of our words.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Node nine complete. The incident site has left my index. I know there was an accident, but not where I stood.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Node ten complete. I know closure was mutual. I no longer remember why we trusted each other to carry it out.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Because the signatures are current and the reasons are in the risk statement. Memory can leave. The operation remains auditable.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I say my name again, as if leaving a label for the stranger about to wake. Zhou Heng, maintenance audit.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Lin Yao, signal architecture. Node eleven complete. I'm sorry. Why did I just apologize to you?

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I don't know. We don't have to chase it. We agreed not to use what is disappearing to demand a new explanation.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The wall says the last step removes cross-indexes. We'll remember the work tonight, but not the part we held together.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I confirm the final hash. Every window outside goes dark. The signal leaves no farewell because it was never a person.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Process complete. Please show identification. I need to confirm the person who carried out this maintenance with me.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I hand over my badge. She reads my name calmly. The gesture feels repeated, but I can't find the first time.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The record shows mutual consent and no unfinished step. That is enough. Familiarity isn't evidence.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: By morning, the glass was dry. The report says anomaly closed, shared index nulled. I understand every word and see no image behind it.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The system gap is entering sealed remediation. The report holds no personal content. Thank you for your work last night.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I should thank her too, but I don't know for what. Instead, I confirm that the tools and checklist she returns are complete.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: This stylus is yours. You left it outside the null room, probably because there was no transparent surface inside.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: When I take it, I leave her the space on my left without thinking. The habit has no explanation, and doesn't need to become one.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Have we met before? Sorry. That question may cross the boundary created by last night's disposition.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The record says there is no need to pursue the private portion. Let's call this our first formal meeting. I'm Zhou Heng.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Lin Yao. My train is here, and I have a review to file. Perhaps we'll share another work order someday.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: 07:41 flashes in the door reflection. I take it for an ordinary clock. The numbers don't catch me or ask me to turn around.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Goodbye, Auditor Zhou. Last night's choice has been carried out. We don't need to reopen it with guesses.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I watch the train leave. The city after rain is clear enough to hold a blank we once chose together.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I choose a controlled channel. The old cache gets sealed. The new channel inherits none of its authority and assumes no lasting consent.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I consent to the attempt, with failure conditions first. Identity mismatch, unresponsive endpoint, timeout, or lost audit closes it immediately.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Sixty seconds per window. Enough bandwidth for structured descriptions, not raw images, sound, touch, or background renewal.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Independent keys, confirmed on separate devices. Open, refuse, expire, and revoke all enter an append-only audit chain.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Silence stores nothing. No reply means no consent. One successful window grants no permission for the next.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: If one person is unconscious or offline, the other can only close. No waiting queue, no export of the absent person's history.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: We retain only descriptions chosen together. The first could read: Platform Seventeen. We found each other during the incident.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Remove “found each other.” It implies a debt. Use this: we used paired buffering and left the platform together.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Agreed. A description states what both can confirm. It infers no feeling, and neither of us can revise it alone.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The old cache requested migration of all sensory frames. Policy denied it. Good. It has finally met a boundary that works.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I confirm the first key on my device. Consent applies to this build only. A rebuild requires both of us again.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Second key confirmed. The channel enters isolated testing and closes in sixty seconds, whether or not we finish speaking.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: When it opens, the glass shows only two fine lines. No platform, no heart rate. At last it looks like a tool, not a wound in memory.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Audit shows two endpoints and no bypass. Send a test description first. Nothing from the incident.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I write: I am at this end of the controlled channel at 00:12, and I am willing to wait for your explicit reply.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I reply: I am at the other end. Identity matches. I consent to receive this description during the current window.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: No third endpoint, hidden cache, or system interpreting our pauses as data. The audit chain is quieter than I expected.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The old cache is requesting a replay of the platform. Policy denied the raw sensory export, but pressure is still climbing.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Don't raise the threshold. Let it fail by the rule. If the channel survives only by loosening the boundary, it closes now.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: One identity digest drifted. The change is small, but it crossed our limit. Auto-close triggered. Keys are being destroyed.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Every light goes dark. No residual frame, no delayed message. The system doesn't even preserve the sentence I hadn't sent.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: This failure is a good result. The constraints are real, and we can still stand here together after the channel closes.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: Open it once more? Not to force success. Only to test whether two active requests create an entirely new session.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I consent to one more sixty-second window. We wait ten seconds first, so one choice doesn't slide automatically into the next.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The second window kept one shared description, then closed on time. The rain was easing, and the city glass returned to ordinary reflections.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The old cache is sealed out of routing. The new channel inherited no old data, only the sentence we chose together.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: We used paired buffering and left Platform Seventeen together. A short sentence, enough to share memory without swallowing either boundary.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: Everything else enters isolated review. No automatic recovery, no automatic deletion. Every disposition needs fresh dual consent.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The channel resolves our cache, not the system gap. Hiding it in maintenance only leaves the next rain to find it for someone else.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: I'll file a sealed disclosure with the patch and every audit hash. Seventy-two hours to remediate, then the gap notice publishes automatically.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: A seal with a deadline isn't silence. Someone can verify that we meet it. I consent to those terms.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: The deadline is committed to an external clock. No internal administrator can extend it alone. In seventy-two hours, the facts leave this roof.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: The controlled channel still exists, but it is closed now. I find that more reassuring than a connection that never ends.

lines.speaker: lin_yao
lines.text: If you want to reach me tomorrow, send an ordinary message. Don't let the glass speak for us, or mistake emergency access for intimacy.

lines.speaker: zhou_heng
lines.text: I promise to open the channel only with your explicit consent. After dawn, we start with a connection either of us can close.

choices.prompt: Confirm together how the anomalous signal will be handled.

options.text: Publish the truth: disclose the system gap while protecting private memory.
Close the signal: null it completely and lose the memory shared between them.
Build a channel: seal the old cache and create a revocable controlled link.
